Package microui.layout

Class ColumnLayout

java.lang.Object
microui.layout.LayoutManager
microui.layout.LinearAxisLayout
microui.layout.ColumnLayout
public final class ColumnLayout extends LinearAxisLayout
Layout manager that arranges child components in a vertical column. Extends LinearAxisLayout to provide vertical stacking of components with weight-based sizing and spacing control.

The ColumnLayout positions components from top to bottom, allocating vertical space based on each component's weight parameter. Components are arranged sequentially with no horizontal overlap.

See Also:

  • Method Details

    • onAdd

      public void onAdd(Container.Entry contentViewEntry)
      Called when a new entry is added to the container. Validates that there is sufficient space for the new component.
      Overrides:
      onAdd in class LayoutManager
      Parameters:
      contentViewEntry - the entry being added
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if weight limit is exceeded (out of bounds)
